title: 3D Mob Drops
description: Gives 3D models to many items dropped by passive and hostile mobs.
body:
This resource pack adds **3d models** to the following items:

<details>
<summary>Show list</summary>

- **Spider Eye**
- **Fermented Spider Eye**
- **Breeze Rod**
- **Blaze Rod**
- **Bone**
- **Phantom Membrane**
- **Nether Star**
- **Ghast Tear**
- **Shulker Shell**
- **Prismarine Crystals**
- **Prismarine Shard**
- **Slimeball**
- **Magma Cream**
- **Gunpowder**
- **Sugar**
- **Glowstone Dust**
- **Redstone Dust**
- **Ink Sac**
- **Glow Ink Sac**
- **Feather**
- **Rabbit Foot**
- **Rabbit Hide**
- **Leather**
- **Armadillo Scute**
- **Turtle Scute**
- **Snowball**
- **Stick**
- **Music Discs**
- **Beef**
- **Porkchop**
- **Rotten Flesh**
- **Potato**
- **Poisonous Potato**
- **Emerald**

</details>


  
Models try to stay close to vanilla designs.

> **No mods required!**
  
**In game preview:**  

![Items on ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c59a80a88e6d3029bc8c602a5b2270726c70b50.png)
